title: iRobot Founder Wants to Put a Robotic Familiar Into Your Home
title_zh: iRobot Founder Wants to Put a Robotic Familiar Into Your Home
abstract: Two years ago,  Colin Angle stepped down as CEO of iRobot ,  the company that he cofounded  and the most successful home robot company the world has ever seen. Angle almost immediately founded a stealthy new “physical AI” company called  Familiar Machines & Magic  (FM&M), which in short order managed to attract a combination of exceptionally talented robotics folks, including  Morgan Pope from Dis
abstract_zh: Two years ago, Colin Angle stepped down as CEO of iRobot , the company that he cofounded and the most successful home robot company the world has ever seen. Angle almost immediately founded a stealthy new “physical AI” company called Familiar Machines & Magic (FM&M), which in short order managed to attract a combination of exceptionally talented robotics folks, including Morgan Pope from Dis
